summary: Project to add admin-editable content controls for specific website sections and optional UI text animation.
architectural_notes: Requested changes should not affect other parts of the system (scope limited to specified sections).

existing_features.title: Add a reusable CSS animation for blinking text (including a reduced-motion safe behavior) and expose it as a simple class name that can be applied to headings.
Update the PageHeader component to support an optional blinking title mode, without changing existing pages by default.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add admin controls for Principal Section (upload photo; edit name, position, message; CRUD principal content)
Add admin controls for Faculty & Staff Section (upload/replace group photos for JHS, SHS, Staff only; keep text fixed)
Support animated/blinking title text output (UI text animation option)

projectName: Add optional blinking animation for page title text
